_doc: 无 review/autopilot gate：session 简报、Rust 格式化与 postToolUse cargo check。router-rs 未参与 Cursor 钩子。

sessionStart._doc: TOKEN REDUCTION: compact project briefing (~300 tokens) at session start.

postToolUse._doc: CODE QUALITY: cargo check on .rs writes.

afterFileEdit._doc: CODE QUALITY: rustfmt on .rs after agent edits.

preCompact._doc: TOKEN AWARENESS: context window stats before compaction.
